author: codex

scope.focus: Remaining live MTA parent/agency contamination duplicate_global_identity issues after identity223-repair.
exclusions: Pairs already present in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json or data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json were not re-proposed as durable decisions.
Broad parent-MTA-to-parent-MTA aliases were skipped when current clusters still carry service, officer, department, committee, or inconsistent entity_type contamination.

messages: Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-lirr and entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq share identity key entity_long-island-rail-rd.

source_canonical_evidence.record_identity: public benefit corporation subsidiary / railroad agency

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: LIRR is a railroad/operating subsidiary; MTA HQ is a headquarters administrative unit. A stray LIRR key on the HQ cluster is agency-list contamination, not identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep railroad subsidiaries separate from HQ/administrative units. Use hierarchy or budget-table context rather than identity aliases.

messages: Global entity records entity_mabstoa and entity_mta-bus-company share identity key entity_manhattan-and-bronx-surface-transit-operating-authority.

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority
source_canonical_evidence.quote: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority

source_canonical_evidence.record_identity: transit agency division / bus operating company

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MaBSTOA and MTA Bus Company are separately named bus-operating entities in MTA/NYCT contexts. Shared combined committee or operations text should not collapse them.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep NYCT, MaBSTOA, SIRTOA, and MTA Bus Company as distinct related bus entities.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-100241-staten-island-railway and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_staten-island-railway.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Staten Island Railway/SIRTOA is an operating agency/service identity; parent MTA is the umbrella authority. They are related but not identical.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge SIR/SIRTOA into parent MTA on broad MTA organizational listings.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-121001-gcmoc and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_grand-central-madison-operating-company.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-121001-gcmoc and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_grand-central-madison-operating-company-gcmoc.

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: GCMOC is a named operating company for Grand Central Madison context; it is not the parent Metropolitan Transportation Authority.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep GCMOC aliases together, but separate operating-company identity from parent MTA.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT is an operating agency; the other record is the parent MTA. The bare MTA acronym is not sufficient identity evidence.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Use parent/subsidiary relations for NYCT under MTA; do not alias NYCT to parent MTA.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_meeting-doc-ddcr share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights
source_canonical_evidence.quote: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights ("DDCR")

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT is an operating agency; DDCR is an MTA department. They are distinct organizational units despite the broad MTA acronym.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep MTA departments separate from operating agencies; represent agency/department relationships explicitly.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT and MTA Bridges and Tunnels/TBTA are sibling MTA agencies, not the same entity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge sibling MTA agencies on the bare MTA acronym.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-metropolitan-transportation-authority share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT is a component operating agency; Metropolitan Transportation Authority is the parent authority/corporation.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Treat MTA branding in NYCT records as affiliation, not identity.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-overall share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
The Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA" or "MTA Group")

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT is an operating agency; the MTA Overall record is the umbrella public benefit corporation.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep umbrella corporate/authority records separate from component agencies.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-real-estate share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT and MTA Real Estate are different organizational units: an operating transit agency and a real-estate department/function.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge operating agencies with MTA departments on generic MTA acronym keys.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-154986-aar and entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta share identity key entity_metropolitan-transportation-authority-mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Access-a-Ride is a paratransit service/program; Metropolitan Transportation Authority is the parent agency.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep AAR service-program aliases separate from parent MTA aliases.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-154986-aar and entity_mta-metropolitan-transportation-authority share identity key entity_metropolitan-transportation-authority-mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: AAR is a service program; this MTA record is the parent authority/corporation.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge AAR with umbrella MTA records solely because AAR is branded as MTA Access-a-Ride.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-154986-aar and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_metropolitan-transportation-authority-mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: AAR is a paratransit service program managed in NYCT/Department of Buses context; NYCT is the operating agency, not the same identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Represent AAR management/operation through relations rather than merging service program and agency.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-154986-aar and entity_mta-overall share identity key entity_metropolitan-transportation-authority-mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA" or "MTA Group")

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: AAR is a service program; the MTA Overall record is the umbrella public benefit corporation.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge branded service programs into umbrella MTA parent records.

messages: Global entity records entity_mta-bus-company and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_mta-bus-woodhaven-workshop2.

source_canonical_evidence.record_identity: transit agency division / bus operating company

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Bus Company and NYCT are related bus-operating entities but not exact same identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not collapse NYCT/New York City Bus and MTA Bus Company because of joint bus project or workshop labels.

live_validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta and entity_mta-metropolitan-transportation-authority share identity key entity_mta-metropolitan-transportation-authority.
skipped_review_only.reason: Likely broad parent-MTA alias in isolation, but current parent clusters still carry inconsistent entity_type signals and contamination from officer, fuel-hedge, real-estate, and committee contexts. Leave for a dedicated parent-MTA canonical-target pass.

live_validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_department-of-buses and entity_mta-nyct-evp-frank-farrell share identity key entity_mta-nyct.
skipped_review_only.reason: This is a person-vs-department DNM candidate, but it is not one of the requested MTA parent/agency contamination records for identity224.

live_validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company-metro-north.
skipped_review_only.reason: Likely committee-vs-agency/reference DNM, but Metro-North was handled in identity223 and this batch is focused on the remaining MTA parent/agency contamination terms named in the prompt.

live_validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-140466-nyct-committee-members and entity_nyct-mta-bus-committee-charter share identity key entity_nyct-committee.
skipped_review_only.reason: Committee-members vs committee-charter identity needs a committee-specific cleanup pass; not a parent-MTA or named agency record in this scope.

skipped_review_only.candidate: Pairs already covered by current overrides but still present in validation_issues.jsonl
skipped_review_only.reason: Current validation_issues.jsonl appears not to reflect all applied identity223-repair overrides. Examples include GCMOC exact alias, SIRTOA/Staten Island Railway alias, TBTA/Bridges alias, MTA Real Estate aliases, and several parent-vs-department DNMs already present in data/identity-overrides/*.json. These were not duplicated in this artifact.

blockers: No materialize/validate/export commands were run by request, so liveness was determined from the current validation_issues.jsonl and current identity override files rather than a freshly regenerated validation report.
Some live validation messages appear stale relative to current identity-overrides; the artifact avoids duplicating existing override decisions.
commands_run: jq schema/count inspection for data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch222-mta-parent-prep.json and identity223 prep artifacts
jq filters over data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl for duplicate_global_identity scope
jq filters over data/identity-review/records.jsonl and data/canonical/entities.jsonl for scoped entity evidence
jq/node read-only comparison of scoped live duplicate pairs against data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
